query:
SELECT 'categories_total' as metric, COUNT(*) as count FROM categories
UNION ALL
SELECT 'categories_top_level', COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE parentId IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'categories_sub', COUNT(*) FROM categories WHERE parentId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 'products_total', COUNT(*) FROM products
UNION ALL
SELECT 'products_visible', COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE isVisible = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'products_with_image', COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND imageUrl != ''
UNION ALL
SELECT 'products_with_category', COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE categoryId IS NOT NULL;
